title: AgRefactor: Self-Evolving Agentic Workflow for HLS Compatibility and Performance
author: arXiv cs.AI
summary: AgRefactor introduces a self-evolving agentic workflow that optimizes High-Level Synthesis (HLS) designs for compatibility and performance. The agent iteratively refactors HLS code, leveraging autonomous improvement to meet hardware constraints. This approach demonstrates the potential of AI-driven automation in hardware design.
